chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2714 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing 1. For order on CMA No.15591/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on office objections 1 to 3. 3. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 05.08.2025 Mr. Sikandar Adil Khan, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2&3. Through this petition, the petitioner seeks post-arrest bail in FIR No.183 of 2025 under Section 9(i)3(b), CNS Act, 2024 registered at Police Station Sharafi Goth. Now the CNS Act has been amended by the Government and proviso for grant of bail is inserted and it is only pending required assent of the Governor, therefore, the petitioner has an alternate remedy to approach the learned trial Court/Special Tribunal/or competent Court, as the case may be, under the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances (Amendment) Act, 2025 for his appropriate relief. Under such circumstances, the instant petition is disposed of; however, the petitioner is at liberty to approach the learned trial court for his appropriate relief. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
